Interface TransferRequestRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
CsvTransferRequestRepository
public interface TransferRequestRepository
Defines persistence operations for TransferRequest records. Implementations are responsible for reading and writing transfer request data to the underlying store, without exposing any storage details to the service layer.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    delete(String id)
    Removes the transfer request record with the given ID from the store.
    List<TransferRequest>
    findAll()
    Returns all transfer requests currently persisted in the store.
    List<TransferRequest>
    findByAnimalId(String animalId)
    Returns all transfer requests associated with the given animal ID.
    List<TransferRequest>
    findByAnimalIdAndStatus(String animalId, RequestStatus status)
    Returns all transfer requests for the given animal ID with the given status.
    List<TransferRequest>
    findByFromShelterId(String shelterId)
    Returns all transfer requests originating from the given shelter ID.
    Optional<TransferRequest>
    findById(String id)
    Returns the transfer request with the given ID, or an empty optional if not found.
    List<TransferRequest>
    findByShelterIdAndStatus(String shelterId, RequestStatus status)
    Returns all transfer requests involving the given shelter as either source or destination, with the given status.
    List<TransferRequest>
    findByStatus(RequestStatus status)
    Returns all transfer requests with the given status.
    List<TransferRequest>
    findByToShelterId(String shelterId)
    Returns all transfer requests targeting the given shelter ID as the destination.
    void
    save(TransferRequest request)
    Persists a new transfer request or overwrites the existing record with the same ID.

  • Method Details

    • save

      void save(TransferRequest request)
      Persists a new transfer request or overwrites the existing record with the same ID. Callers are responsible for ensuring the request is fully constructed before saving.
      Parameters:
      request - the transfer request to save; must not be null

    • findById

      Optional<TransferRequest> findById(String id)
      Returns the transfer request with the given ID, or an empty optional if not found. Does not throw if the ID is absent — callers decide how to handle the missing case.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier to look up; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the request, or empty if not found

    • findAll

      List<TransferRequest> findAll()
      Returns all transfer requests currently persisted in the store. Returns an empty list if no requests have been saved.
      Returns:
      a list of all transfer requests

    • findByAnimalId

      List<TransferRequest> findByAnimalId(String animalId)
      Returns all transfer requests associated with the given animal ID. Returns an empty list if no requests exist for that animal.
      Parameters:
      animalId - the animal ID to filter by; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      a list of transfer requests for the specified animal

    • findByFromShelterId

      List<TransferRequest> findByFromShelterId(String shelterId)
      Returns all transfer requests originating from the given shelter ID. Returns an empty list if no requests originated from that shelter.
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the source shelter ID to filter by; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      a list of transfer requests from the specified shelter

    • findByToShelterId

      List<TransferRequest> findByToShelterId(String shelterId)
      Returns all transfer requests targeting the given shelter ID as the destination. Returns an empty list if no requests are destined for that shelter.
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the destination shelter ID to filter by; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      a list of transfer requests targeting the specified shelter

    • findByStatus

      List<TransferRequest> findByStatus(RequestStatus status)
      Returns all transfer requests with the given status. Returns an empty list if no requests match the given status.
      Parameters:
      status - the request status to filter by; must not be null
      Returns:
      a list of transfer requests with the specified status

    • findByShelterIdAndStatus

      List<TransferRequest> findByShelterIdAndStatus(String shelterId, RequestStatus status)
      Returns all transfer requests involving the given shelter as either source or destination, with the given status. Combines shelter and status filtering in one query to avoid secondary filtering in the service layer. Returns an empty list if no matching requests are found.
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the shelter ID to filter by (matched against both source and destination); must not be null or blank
      status - the request status to filter by; must not be null
      Returns:
      a list of transfer requests involving the specified shelter with the specified status

    • findByAnimalIdAndStatus

      List<TransferRequest> findByAnimalIdAndStatus(String animalId, RequestStatus status)
      Returns all transfer requests for the given animal ID with the given status. Combines animal and status filtering in one query to avoid secondary filtering in the service layer. Returns an empty list if no matching requests are found.
      Parameters:
      animalId - the animal ID to filter by; must not be null or blank
      status - the request status to filter by; must not be null
      Returns:
      a list of transfer requests for the specified animal with the specified status

    • delete

      void delete(String id)
      Removes the transfer request record with the given ID from the store. Does nothing if no request with that ID exists.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the request to delete; must not be null or blank
